location: Guaranteed drop from Blaidd the Half-Wolf, who turns hostile and attacks outside Ranni's Rise (Three Sisters, Liurnia of the Lakes) once Ranni's questline has been fully completed. Killing him before finishing her questline gives no reward.
tactics: Complete Ranni the Witch's entire questline first; approaching Ranni's Rise afterward triggers Blaidd waiting outside, already hostile.
He fights fast with sweeping greatsword combos and a jumping strike — punish after his combo strings end rather than trading blows mid-combo.
There's no way to avoid the fight peacefully once flagged; you must defeat him to finish his arc and claim his gear.
lore: A greatsword styled after Carian royal fashion, once carried by Blaidd the Half-Wolf. Its blade was said to be infused with cold magic the instant he swore his oath of service to Ranni.

builds.name: Frost Int/Strength Hybrid
builds.why: Intelligence is its single highest-scaling stat, only narrowly ahead of Strength, and Wolf's Assault's ice explosion applies heavy frostbite on top of solid magic damage.
